title: JustPlay
description: just play and enjoy the world
body:
The Just Play modpack offers a Minecraft experience that's all about discovery, building, and adventure. It starts with underwater explorations in the depths of the ocean and spans to roaming the high mountain ranges, inviting you to uncover every corner of the Minecraft universe.

Imagine a place where the mysteries of the deep sea mingle with the joys of coastal life, where communities rise on land as you build towns and form empires with sky-piercing towers. Here, the landscape's beauty is matched by legendary creatures you can battle or befriend.

Adventures await in this modpack: heroic struggles against epic beings, tame or challenge them. There's a harmony among the diverse gameplay elements, allowing you to shape your own narrative. The Just Play modpack is your perfect companion on this journey, smoothing the transition between the game's various aspects.

Step into the rich and varied world of Minecraft, where surprises await around every corner. Let the 'Just Play' modpack guide you through a sea of endless possibilities. Treasures lie hidden in the depths, towers reach for the skies, and beneath each block, new stories are waiting to be discovered. Experience your Minecraft adventure like never before – simply, freely, with the Just Play modpack.

Incloude some external mod
Mowzie's Mobs
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs
Aquaculture 2
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
Realm RPG: Sea Dwellers
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers
